mapper.insert: insert into testdot_table ( id, test_id, test_type, unit_index, chn_index, test_mode, volt_mode, pole, dot_precision, meter_val, program_val, adc, check_adc, programk, programb, adck, adcb, check_adck, check_adcb, success, info, date ) values ( #{id}, #{testId}, #{testType}, #{unitIndex}, #{chnIndex}, #{mode}, #{voltMode}, #{pole}, #{precision}, #{meterVal}, #{programVal}, #{adc}, #{checkAdc}, #{programk}, #{programb}, #{adck}, #{adcb}, #{checkAdck}, #{checkAdcb}, #{success}, #{info}, #{date} )
